# Docly

> By students. For students. Docly is a student community for sharing course notes, asking questions, and earning points by helping classmates.

Docly lets university students upload and download course documents (notes, past exams, summaries), follow modules, discuss questions in a community feed, and chat with peers. The app supports English, French, and Arabic with full RTL.

## Pages

- [Home](/): University banner, recent uploads, browse modules.
- [Search](/search): Search documents, users, and subjects across the platform.
- [Library](/library): Personal library — downloads, uploads, and saved documents.
- [Community](/community): Student feed of posts and questions.
- [Upload](/upload): Publish a new document and earn points.
- [Sign in](/signin): Sign in to your Docly account.
- [Create account](/register): Join the Docly student community.

## Optional

- [Notifications](/notifications): Activity and follow updates.
- [Settings](/settings): Language, theme, and account preferences.
